name: Rogue
description: Criminal elements familiar with the rougher or more illegal methods of attaining goals.

thief.name: Thief
thief.description: You steal from the rich and give to… well, yourself, actually.

enforcer.name: Enforcer
enforcer.description: You are a leg-breaker, thug or assassin for a criminal group.

mishaps.1: Severely injured (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: You are arrested and sent to prison. You must muster out, and any Benefit rolls from this term are forfeit.
mishaps.3: A job goes spectacularly wrong. Gain an Enemy and lose all Benefit rolls from this term.
mishaps.4: You betray — or are betrayed by — a partner in crime. Gain them as an Enemy.
mishaps.5: A rival criminal organisation targets you and you are forced to flee or go straight. Muster out.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: A job goes wrong and you are pursued by the law. Roll Stealth 8+ or Deception 8+ to escape. On failure, roll on the Mishap Table (not ejected). Either way, gain an Enemy in law enforcement.
events.4: You befriend a fence, crime boss, or fellow criminal. Gain a Contact or Ally in the underworld.
events.5: You pull off a lucrative heist. Gain DM+2 to any one Benefit roll.
events.6: You spend time working the shadows of a particular world. Gain one of Streetwise 1, Stealth 1, Deception 1 or Persuade 1.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: You are given a delicate job by a major criminal syndicate. Roll Stealth 8+ or Deception 8+; on success, gain a Contact in the syndicate and DM+2 to your next Advancement. On failure, gain an Enemy and roll on the Mishap Table (not ejected).
events.9: You clash with law enforcement. Roll Streetwise 8+ or Gun Combat 8+ to escape; on failure, gain an Enemy in the Agents and a Rival on the streets.
events.10: You earn a reputation in the underworld. Gain DM+2 to your next Advancement roll.
events.11: You acquire specialist knowledge or equipment. Either gain one level of Gun Combat, Stealth, Electronics or Melee, or DM+4 to your next Advancement roll.
events.12: You pull off a caper that becomes legendary. You are automatically promoted and gain DM+2 to any one Benefit roll.
